name: IntentRecipe
description: Maps user intent to workflow recipes stored as JSON files in Recipes/. Provides tools to match, list, retrieve, and create recipes.

function.name: match_intent
function.description: Match the user's request against available workflow recipes and return the best matching recipe with its steps. Call this at the start of a turn when the user describes a task they want to accomplish — if a recipe matches, follow its steps.

input.description: The user's request or description of what they want to do.

max_results.description: Maximum number of matching recipes to return (default: 3).

function.name: list_recipes
function.description: List all available workflow recipes with their id, name, description, and tags.

function.name: get_recipe
function.description: Load a specific recipe by its id and return its full details including all steps.

function.name: add_recipe
function.description: Create a new workflow recipe and save it to the Recipes/ directory so it is available in future sessions.

id.description: A unique snake_case identifier for the recipe (e.g. 'deploy_to_prod').

name.description: A short human-readable name for the recipe.

description.description: One-sentence description of what the recipe accomplishes.

intents.description: List of keywords and phrases that signal this recipe should be matched.

steps.description: Ordered list of steps the agent should follow. Each step is either a plain string instruction, or a conditional branch object: {"if": "condition", "then": [steps], "else": [steps]} where 'else' is optional. Branches may be nested.

then.description: Steps to follow when the condition is true.

else.description: Steps to follow when the condition is false (optional).

version.description: Semantic version string for the recipe (e.g. '1.0.0').

inputs.description: Declared inputs the recipe expects before starting. Each item has 'name', 'description', and optional 'required' (boolean, defaults true).

outputs.description: Declared output artefacts the recipe produces. Each item has 'name' and 'description'.

adviser_profile.description: Names of advisory council members to consult when this recipe runs (e.g. ['LegalCounsel', 'Ethicist']). Overrides the default council configuration for this workflow.
